subcodes.first_line: O trusted one of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Two missives bearing thy signature have been received, one dated the 25th of Ṣafar 1337, and the other without date [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای امین عبدالبهاء دو طغرا مکتوب شما یکی بتاریخ ۲۵ صفر ۱۳۳۷ و دیگری بدون تاریخ
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @business; financial; property matters, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @prophecy and fulfillment, @service to others; to the Cause of God
